items.name: C2 — Sky Island Tiles (regenerate set)
items.notes: Mevcut sky-island-center-tile / edge-left / edge-right görselleri raw-tile gibi, paper-craft stiline uymuyor (UI grid artifacts var). Yeni style guide ile 3'ü tek board olarak yeniden üret.
items.prompt: See ASSET_PROMPTS.md → PART C / C1. Generate one wide reference board with three sky island tiles (left edge, center, right edge) on transparent BG. Match paper-craft style of attached source boards exactly.

items.name: C2 — Portal Rings blue+gold (regenerate)
items.notes: sky-portal-ring-blue / -gold çok düz vector görünüyor, paper-craft değil. İkisini tek dosyada paper-craft stilinde yeniden iste.
items.prompt: See ASSET_PROMPTS.md → PART C / C2.

items.prompt: See ASSET_PROMPTS.md → PART C / C3.

items.name: C2 — Storm Cloud (regenerate)
items.notes: Mevcut storm cloud okay ama paper-craft stilinde değil.
items.prompt: See ASSET_PROMPTS.md → PART C / C4.

items.name: C2 — Void Mist (regenerate)
items.notes: void-mist çok soluk, görünmüyor. Daha karakteristik paper-craft sis bandı lazım.
items.prompt: See ASSET_PROMPTS.md → PART C / C5.

items.name: C2 — Wind River Ribbon (regenerate)
items.notes: wind-river-ribbon çok soluk pembe çizgiler, paper-craft değil. Tutarlı bir paper-band stilinde olmalı.
items.prompt: See ASSET_PROMPTS.md → PART C / C6.

items.name: Crystal Cluster (C3)
items.notes: C3 caves için ışıldayan kristal kümesi — purple/cyan/yellow varyantlar. Cave duvarına yapışık, bouncy obstacle.
items.prompt: Paper-craft style glowing crystal cluster, faceted purple gem with cyan rim glow, mounted on dark cave wall, hand-cut paper layers, soft shadow, transparent BG, 512x512 PNG.

items.name: Stalactite (C3)
items.notes: Tavandan sarkan sivri taş. Top değdiğinde yukarıdan düşen tehlike.
items.prompt: Paper-craft hanging stalactite, layered grey/charcoal stone, dripping tip, subtle moisture highlight, transparent BG, 256x512 PNG.

items.name: Glow Shard (collectible)
items.prompt: Paper-craft floating crystal shard, vibrant cyan-pink gradient, soft outer glow, transparent BG, 256x256 PNG.

items.name: Lava Pool (C4) — 8f loop
items.notes: Bubbling lava — top değerse reset. 8-frame loop animation.
items.prompt: Paper-craft bubbling lava pool, glowing orange-red surface with darker crust patches, 8-frame loop, transparent BG, 2048x256 PNG.

items.name: Ember Particle (C4) — 6f
items.prompt: Paper-craft tiny glowing ember rising and fading, 6-frame strip, warm orange, transparent BG, 768x128 PNG.

items.name: Anvil (C4 obstacle)
items.prompt: Paper-craft forge anvil, dark iron grey with lighter top edge, ink outline, transparent BG, 512x384 PNG.

items.name: Candy Cane Pole (C5)
items.prompt: Paper-craft red-and-white striped candy cane upright, slight curve at top, glossy paper texture, transparent BG, 256x768 PNG.

items.name: Gummy Block (C5)
items.prompt: Paper-craft jelly gummy cube, vibrant red/orange/green variants, slight squish, glossy highlight, transparent BG, 384x384 PNG.

items.name: Syrup Splash (C5) — 8f
items.prompt: Paper-craft thick chocolate-syrup ripple loop, 8 frame strip, brown gradient with glossy highlight, transparent BG, 2048x256 PNG.

items.name: Settings Gear Icon
items.prompt: Paper-craft settings gear, warm tan paper with brown ink outline, 8-tooth wheel with center bolt, transparent BG, 256x256 PNG.

items.name: Pause Menu Frame
items.prompt: Paper-craft 9-slice torn paper frame, cream center with brown deckle edges, drop shadow, transparent BG, 512x512 PNG.

items.name: Victory Confetti Burst — 8f
items.prompt: Paper-craft confetti burst with mixed colors (red/yellow/cyan/pink), 8-frame strip, transparent BG, 2048x256 PNG.

items.name: Hole-in-One Stars — 6f
items.prompt: Paper-craft three rotating stars, bright yellow with sparkle, 6-frame loop, transparent BG, 1536x256 PNG.

items.name: Ball Trail Particle — 4f
items.notes: Top hareket halinde arkada bıraktığı puff.
items.prompt: Paper-craft small white smoke puff, 4-frame fade, transparent BG, 512x128 PNG.

items.name: Tutorial Arrow — 4f
items.notes: C1 L1'de aim yönünü göstermek için.
items.prompt: Paper-craft pointing arrow, warm orange with brown outline, 4-frame bounce, transparent BG, 512x128 PNG.
